{{CargoOrgan
|name=Foul Mutant Maw
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10853
|idx=58
|description=A grotesquely twisted orifice covered in corrosive darkness. It absorbs life energy from its surroundings and releases sinister energy waves—typically used to spew venom, acid, or other devastating substances.
|skill=
|hp=1404
|def=145
|atk=230
|rush=116
|gene1=Per purple or higher organ implanted, {race} ATK +4
Purple or higher Organs implanted: 40/40
|gene2=Earth RES +60
|gene3=Ignore Earth RES +60
|gene4=Earth DMG +60
|gene7=Earth DMG +3% (Awakened)
|}}
